dimension_results.summary: While the system correctly identifies several standard compliance issues related to missing fields (supplier address, VAT number, invoice/receipt numbers, tax information), it makes two significant categorization errors by treating an Uber receipt as both a personal mileage claim and a flight expense. These errors suggest the system may be applying generic templates without properly analyzing the specific nature of the receipt. For a Global People ICP in Germany, the Uber receipt should be evaluated as a third-party transportation service, not as mileage reimbursement or flight expense.
